stories.title: Workspace migration: create workspaces table and add workspace_id to boards
acceptance_criteria: workspaces table exists with id, name, owner_id, created_at columns
boards table has workspace_id foreign key column
migration runs without errors

stories.title: Workspace entity, repository, and service (create, read, delete)
acceptance_criteria: Workspace JPA entity mapped to workspaces table
WorkspaceRepository extends JpaRepository
WorkspaceService has create, findById, delete methods
Unit tests pass for service layer

stories.title: Workspace membership: add/remove members API
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/workspaces/{id}/members adds a member
DELETE /api/v1/workspaces/{id}/members/{userId} removes a member
Returns 404 if workspace not found
Returns 403 if caller is not workspace owner

stories.title: Assign board to workspace: update board creation and board response
acceptance_criteria: Board creation accepts workspaceId in request body
BoardResponse includes workspaceId field
Boards without workspace return null workspaceId

stories.title: Migration: add card_assignees join table and start_date column
acceptance_criteria: card_assignees join table created with card_id and user_id columns
cards table has start_date column of type DATE
Migration runs without errors

stories.title: Card model and CardResponse: replace assigneeId with assignees list and add startDate
acceptance_criteria: Card entity has ManyToMany relationship to User via card_assignees
CardResponse replaces assigneeId with List<UserSummary> assignees
CardResponse includes startDate field
Existing card endpoints return updated response shape

stories.title: Add/remove assignee API endpoints on cards
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/cards/{id}/assignees adds a user as assignee
DELETE /api/v1/cards/{id}/assignees/{userId} removes assignee
Returns 404 if card or user not found
Returns 409 if user already assigned

stories.title: Update card startDate via PATCH card endpoint
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/v1/cards/{id} accepts startDate field
startDate persisted and returned in CardResponse
startDate can be set to null to clear it

stories.title: Attachment migration: create attachments table
acceptance_criteria: attachments table created with id, card_id, filename, url, uploaded_by, created_at columns
card_id is a foreign key to cards table
Migration runs without errors

stories.title: Attachment upload API: POST /api/v1/cards/{id}/attachments
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/cards/{id}/attachments accepts multipart/form-data
File stored and URL persisted in attachments table
Returns AttachmentResponse with id, filename, url, uploadedAt
Returns 404 if card not found

stories.title: Board stars migration: create board_stars table
acceptance_criteria: board_stars table created with user_id and board_id columns
Composite primary key on (user_id, board_id)
Migration runs without errors

stories.title: Board star/unstar API and starred board list endpoint
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/boards/{id}/star stars the board for current user
DELETE /api/v1/boards/{id}/star unstars the board
GET /api/v1/me/starred-boards returns list of starred boards
Returns 404 if board not found

stories.title: Inbox API: GET /api/v1/me/inbox — cards assigned to current user across all boards
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/me/inbox returns all cards where current user is an assignee
Response includes board name and column name for context
Results ordered by dueDate ascending, nulls last

stories.title: Today API: GET /api/v1/me/today — cards due today across all boards
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/me/today returns cards where dueDate equals today
Only returns cards assigned to or created by current user
Response includes board and column context

stories.title: Upcoming API: GET /api/v1/me/upcoming — cards due in next 7 days
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/me/upcoming returns cards due within the next 7 days from today
Excludes cards due today (covered by Today API)
Results ordered by dueDate ascending

stories.title: WorkspaceSwitcher component: display current workspace name with dropdown to switch
acceptance_criteria: WorkspaceSwitcher renders current workspace name in sidebar header
Dropdown lists all workspaces the user belongs to
Selecting a workspace updates the active workspace context
Switching workspace reloads board list

stories.title: Sidebar: starred boards section
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar shows Starred Boards section above All Boards
Lists boards starred by current user with board name links
Section hidden if no boards are starred
Clicking a board navigates to board view

stories.title: Sidebar: smart view nav items (Inbox, Today, Upcoming) with card counts
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar shows Inbox, Today, Upcoming navigation items
Each item displays a badge with current card count
Counts update on sidebar render
Clicking navigates to corresponding view page

stories.title: InboxView page: card list with board/column context
acceptance_criteria: InboxView page renders at /inbox route
Lists all assigned cards with card title, board name, column name
Shows due date if present
Empty state shown when no cards

stories.title: TodayView and UpcomingView pages
acceptance_criteria: TodayView page renders at /today route with cards due today
UpcomingView page renders at /upcoming route with cards due in next 7 days
Both pages show card title, board, column, and due date
Empty state shown when no cards

stories.title: Sidebar: boards grouped under workspace with task count
acceptance_criteria: All Boards section groups boards under their workspace name
Each board row shows a task count badge
Workspaces without boards show no board entries
Board links navigate to board view

stories.title: Timeline data endpoint: GET /api/v1/boards/{id}/timeline
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/boards/{id}/timeline returns all cards with startDate or dueDate
Response includes id, title, startDate, dueDate, columnName, assignees
Cards without both dates are excluded
Returns 404 if board not found

stories.title: TimelineView: horizontal date grid with month/week header
acceptance_criteria: TimelineView renders at /boards/{id}/timeline route
Horizontal scrollable grid shows days as columns
Header row shows month labels and week numbers
View spans at least 3 months from today

stories.title: Timeline task bars: render colored bars per card spanning startDate to dueDate
acceptance_criteria: Each card renders as a colored horizontal bar
Bar spans from startDate column to dueDate column
Bar is positioned in the row corresponding to the card
Hovering bar shows card title tooltip

stories.title: CalendarView: monthly grid with cards on due-date cells
acceptance_criteria: CalendarView renders at /boards/{id}/calendar route
Monthly grid shows 7-column week layout
Cards appear on the cell matching their dueDate
Card chips show card title, truncated if needed

stories.title: CalendarView: month navigation (previous/next) and view toggle integration
acceptance_criteria: Previous and Next buttons navigate between months
Current month label updates on navigation
View toggle allows switching between Board, Calendar, and Timeline views
Active view is highlighted in the toggle

stories.title: Swimlane toggle: group cards by label within each board column
acceptance_criteria: Board header has a Swimlanes toggle button
When enabled, cards in each column are grouped by label
Each swimlane row shows the label name as a header
Cards without a label appear in an Unlabeled swimlane

stories.title: Card detail: multi-assignee avatar stack display
acceptance_criteria: Card detail modal shows stacked avatars for all assignees
Avatar stack shows up to 3 avatars then +N overflow indicator
Each avatar shows user initials or profile image
Hovering an avatar shows user display name

stories.title: Card detail: assignee picker to add/remove multiple assignees
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the avatar stack opens an assignee picker dropdown
Picker lists workspace members with checkboxes
Checking a member calls add assignee API
Unchecking a member calls remove assignee API

stories.title: Card detail: attachment upload UI (file picker and attachment list)
acceptance_criteria: Card detail modal shows an Attachments section
File picker button triggers file upload to POST /cards/{id}/attachments
Uploaded attachments listed with filename and download link
Upload progress indicator shown during upload

stories.title: Card detail: copy-link button copies shareable card URL to clipboard
acceptance_criteria: Card detail modal has a Copy Link button
Clicking copies the full card URL to clipboard
Button shows a checkmark confirmation for 2 seconds after copy
URL navigates directly to the card when opened

stories.title: Board star toggle on board header and BoardCard
acceptance_criteria: Board header shows a star icon button
BoardCard in boards list shows a star icon button
Clicking star calls POST /boards/{id}/star or DELETE /boards/{id}/star
Star icon reflects current starred state immediately (optimistic update)

stories.title: Mobile bottom navigation bar (Board, Today, Timeline, Inbox tabs)
acceptance_criteria: Bottom nav bar visible on screens narrower than 768px
Four tabs: Board, Today, Timeline, Inbox
Active tab is highlighted
Tapping a tab navigates to the corresponding view

stories.title: Mobile board view: horizontal scrollable column tabs replacing desktop column layout
acceptance_criteria: On mobile, board columns are shown as tabs at the top
Active column tab shows that column's cards below
Tabs are horizontally scrollable if they overflow
Desktop layout unchanged at 768px and above

stories.title: Mobile card layout: responsive CardItem and CardModal
acceptance_criteria: CardItem is full-width on mobile with touch-friendly tap target
CardModal opens as a bottom sheet on mobile
All card detail fields are accessible in the bottom sheet
Desktop card modal behavior unchanged at 768px and above
